categories.label: WhatsApp / Telegram
categories.desc: Check a chat handle sending scams

categories.label: Social Media URL
categories.desc: Screen profile cloning or fake giveaways

categories.label: Deepfake Media
categories.note: QRaksha doesn't run deepfake-detection AI yet — this routes to the official reporting portal instead of a fake result.

categories.label: Mobile App (.apk)
categories.note: APK inspection needs a dedicated static-analysis engine QRaksha doesn't have built yet — routes to official reporting for now.

awareness.title: Jhutha App Ko Pahchano
awareness.body: Refrain from installing and investing through suspicious money-earning apps offering quick, high returns/benefits.
awareness.source: Adapted from public RBI/cybercrime awareness advisories

awareness.title: Digital Arrest Is Not Real
awareness.body: No Indian law enforcement agency conducts arrests or legal proceedings over a video call. Hang up and report at cybercrime.gov.in.

awareness.title: Never Share an OTP
awareness.body: No bank, telecom company, or government agency will ever ask you to share an OTP over a call or message.

awareness.title: Job Offers Never Cost Money
awareness.body: A real employer never asks a candidate to pay a 'registration' or 'task unlock' fee to receive work.

awareness.title: Matrimonial Safety
awareness.body: Be cautious of a match who quickly moves the conversation toward investment advice or urgent money requests.

awareness.title: Scanning a QR Never Gives You Money
awareness.body: Scanning a QR code and entering your UPI PIN can only send money out of your account — it is never used to receive a refund, cashback, or prize.

note: Category icons are generic emoji, not official logos. Platform report links point to each company's own public help/report pages — QRaksha does not use or reproduce their trademarked logos. Awareness content is adapted/paraphrased from public advisories; each entry links to its own source rather than presenting itself as that authority.
